body_txt: An area of strip joints, brothels , sex toy shops and other seedy locales. Very much based on reality in cities like Amsterdam . Fiction portrays it with many perspectives, and depictions vary widely from Good to Bad to Ugly: Good: Drunk, happy, middle-class businessmen wander cheerfully. Sexy, smiling Hookers with Hearts of Gold wave from balconies and doorways, eager to engage in Unproblematic Prostitution . A friendly, older Miss Kitty takes care of sex workers and helps you choose a partner. The protagonist gets to enjoy the Fanservice and have a good time with a hooker, or gets made fun of by his pals for being unable to get up the courage. In this lighter portrayal, everyone seems to agree Sex Is Good and the district is fun for all involved. Bad: Sloppy drunks stagger down the streets. The customers are creepy, leering, pathetic, ugly, and implicitly frustrated that no self-respecting person would have sex with them . The Streetwalkers proposition them anyway, not out of passion, but desperation. They may be addicted to hard drugs , exploited by a Predatory Pimp , and with no other prospects or means to survive. The protagonist is presumably here by necessity, not choice. Possibly located in a Wretched Hive or The City Narrows , with allusions to broader social ills that have contributed to the district sinking into such a sorry state. Often shaded in the grey, bleak light of the early morning, there is something tragic and pitiful in this portrayal. Only Fan Disservice awaits here, as ultimately it is not very sexy or fun. Ugly: The drunks will fight you. The Predatory Prostitutes will rob you (and can you even blame them?) because being a predator is the only way to survive in this No Woman's Land . They may even be Sex Slaves exploited by Human Traffickers , degraded and abused by Unsexy Sadists , and in constant fear of getting killed . Don't bother calling the police — they won't come here, and instead let the gangsters run the place . This is the premise Played for Horror : a place where the depraved do unspeakable things to the helpless. Definitely located in a Wretched Hive . The protagonist is either Caught in the Bad Part of Town or hopelessly naïve, and will be wishing he found the good version before the end of the night. Common in a Crime and Punishment Series , particularly when a Disposable Sex Worker is a victim, as death seems to be the near-inevitable fate of anyone caught here. The term came from railroad workers leaving their red work lamps outside the businesses they were patronizing when going into town for the evening so that they could be located if they needed to be called back to work on short notice (said lamps frequently being left by brothels and bars). Compare Band of Brothels and Freestate Amsterdam . noreallife
